## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue if there is one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] `bunx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `cd web && bun run build` passes (if the SPA changed)
- [ ] No real names, emails, URLs, or tokens — fictional data only
      (`alice`/`bob`/`carol`, `example.com`)
- [ ] No breaking change to `/api/v1` or to released `manifest.json` fields
- [ ] `docs/configuration.md` + `.env.example` updated if env vars changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` entry for user-visible changes
